{{Quote|I will not rest until my honor is regained! With your death, my scars become my glory!|Nagyan, attacking Boba Fett|<ref name="Number Two in the Galaxy">{{Tales|18|Number Two in the Galaxy}}</ref>}}
'''Nagyan''' was one of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] sent by [[Risso Nu]] to catch [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] on [[Ma'ar Shaddam/Legends|Ma'ar Shaddam]]. At some point in his career, he came into conflict with Fett and sustained several scars as a result of their altercation. His primary motivation for going along with Nu's plan was the opportunity it presented for Nagyan to recover his honor with Fett's death.

Nagyan bore an impressive array of knives, but his penchant for bladed weapons ultimately proved his undoing, as Fett killed him with one of his own knives.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|18|Number Two in the Galaxy}} {{1st}}
